strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with full-stack expertise (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang, Java, etc.)
Recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators) at re:cinq
Open-source leadership with GISCollective, a geo-data platform used by NGOs and conservation professionals
concerns: No evidence of AI product/platform build experience (only infrastructure/tooling work)
No advanced degrees in AI-related fields (BS in CS and Photography)
Lacks entrepreneurial/startup experience within larger organizations (only founder experience)
response.justification: The candidate meets the 15+ years requirement and demonstrates strong engineering skills, including recent AI-agent infrastructure work. However, there is no concrete evidence of building AI-powered products/platforms (only tools/infrastructure). The lack of advanced AI degrees or entrepreneurial experience within larger organizations further reduces alignment with the preferred qualifications.
